posts.text: But don't worry, I know Jared is so moral that he wouldn't dream of jeopardizing American interests to make a buck, or a billion. He's so decent we probably don't need to check in on him. Just keep letting him do backroom deals for himself while we fight wars for other countries.

Hunter Biden was such an amateur. Making puny $5 million deals off his family name. Jared Kushner is telling him to hold his champagne. He's making $5 billion deals with the very countries he's negotiating with, on behalf of America. Biggest conflict of intrerest you can imagine.

I get that the polling is complicated, but in the online community this is what I hear non-stop. MAGA is dead. Trump killed it. Everyone is sick of our politicians bowing to a foreign country and being ordered around. People are choosing principles over personalities and parties.


CaseStudyQB (@CaseStudyQB)

.@PiersUncensored (3/16/2026): @CarriePrejean1 "The only reason why we are even in Iran right now is because of Israel...this is embarrassing...why are we allowing a foreign country to occu

If you want to find out how money took over Washignton and created the swamp, then listen to Master Plan Season 1. And if you want to know how they created a presidency that is so gigantic in its scope that it's making endless war much easier, listen to Master Plan Season 2.


David Sirota (@davidsirota)

🚨MASTER PLAN SEASON 2 IS HERE 🚨 

Unearthing never-before-seen documents, we expose the secret plot to turn the presidency into a king.

Trump is the culmination of a 50-year plan that spanned

I don't know anyone, on left or the right, who can't stand mainstream media more than I do. National political reporters are the biggest liars ever. They say billions in campaign contributions don't affect politicians. Come the fuck on! And Israeli lobby has no influence in DC!

Currently IDF is busy doing two things. Bombing everywhere in Iran now that they are defenseless (that's their specialty), including civilian targets. Getting ready for a ground invasion of Lebanon. Why don't they redirect those forces to where we need them?

Trump is begging half the world to help him open up the Strait of Hormuz. I got an idea. Why doesn't Israel do it? 

I hear they have a legendary military. I know they're great at slaughtering defenseless women and children, but why don't they help us with this war they started?

Everyone knows the answer - Israel bought almost all our politicians and they're making us stay. Only people who pretend not to know the answer are the "reporters" in traditional media. They claim to be flummoxed. They have no idea how to follow the money. Sure, buddy, sure.
Trump said today, "You could make the case that we shouldn't be there at all." Exactly! You know who made that case during the campaign? You did! Then, why don't we fucking leave?!

So, wondering whether we're going to send in ground troops is "very obnoxious"? Aren't all Americans wondering that? Has Israel banned this question? Or the more important one - why isn't it Israeli ground troops going in since they're the ones who wanted this war?


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

ABC: Can you say why we're sending 5,000 Marines and sailors?

TRUMP: Shhhhh. You're a very obnoxious person

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033351337031655682#m

Wait, are "winning," they're "decimated" and Iran is "about to surrender" or do we desperately need European countries to join us in this war? It definitely can't be both.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Leavitt: "Yes, the president is speaking with our allies to encourage them to do more to open the Strait of Hormuz. And our NATO allies especially need to step up. He's calling on them to do the right thing."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033524097745858747#m

Trump kissing Mark Levin's ass is a turning point. It's disgusted a lot of online MAGA. To them it looks like Trump is jumping the shark and saying that they better support Levin over MAGA stalwarts like @megynkelly @TuckerCarlson & @FmrRepMTG. 

But polling indicates older MAGA voters do believe whatever Trump says. So, are they going to say the MAGA movement is officially Israel First now, led by @marklevinshow and @benshapiro? 

Because if they do, then MAGA officially becomes noecons. Given

When national media covers this, they don't acknowledge Democratic politicians never give their voters what they want. Instead, they applaud Democrats for ignoring their antisemitic voters and being better than them. They encourage them to betray their voters on behalf of Israel.

I see @RoKhanna fighting against Israel's endless demands for war and genocide. Some of the so-called progressives have voted to ban offensive bombs, whatever that means. But overall, Democrats in Congress are betraying their voters massively and backing their donors instead.

Only 13% of Democrats have positive views towards Israel. That's stunningly low. 57% of Democrats have negative attitudes towards them. Democratic politicians are exact opposite. They're still kissing Israel's ass and sending them our money. Why? They're bribed by Israeli lobby.

It's an acknowledged fact that Lindsey Graham coordinated with Israeli government on how to push America into a war for Israel. Why hasn't he been arrested? That's obviously acting as an agent for a foreign government. How is that not treason? That got 13 Americans killed so far.

They're investigating whether @TuckerCarlson took direction from foreign government. Are there any Americans left in CIA or anywhere in our government who can investigate hundreds of politicians and media figures who are clearly working for Israel? Our government is compromised.

Because when we get on, we might ask questions that are impossible to answer, like, "Why do we have to use American ground troops? Why doesn't Israel use their troops instead?" Isn't it weird that people claiming to be "objective" don't want anyone ever giving the other side?

Television is obsessed with ratings, but not a single giant podcaster who is against the war has been invited on. There are many podcasters who have millions of followers who are against the war and Israel. Magically, that's when TV stops caring about ratings. No dissent allowed!

This is a remarkable clip from 14 years ago. Back when journalism was allowed on TV, they report that the head of Mossad wanted to push America, and many other countries, into a war with Iran, so they would do the fighting instead of Israel. This has been the plan all along.
